segments.text: Hits the bomb, air turnaround fair—but it doesn't land!
segments.original_text: 爆弾を当てて空中切り返して空中前ですがこれは通らない

segments.text: But there's another fair off the bomb right on landing!
segments.original_text: しかしそのまままた着地際に爆弾からの空中前

full_text: Hits the bomb, air turnaround fair—but it doesn't land! But there's another fair off the bomb right on landing!
